name: Bisquick Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the breakfast sausage, Bisquick mix, and grated Cheddar cheese in a large bowl.
2. Mix all ingredients together very well until a smooth batter is formed.
3. Form the mixture into small balls, about 1 to 2 inches in diameter.
4. Place the balls on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the balls are lightly browned and cooked through.
6. The dish may be made ahead of time and stored frozen.
